title: Skiathos Short Final
subtitle: LGSK 01 · 4 NM on 3° path · A330 · 20 kt right crosswind
description: Iconic short-runway approach into Alexandros Papadiamantis (Skiathos / JSI). Spawn exactly 4 NM from the RWY 01 threshold on its 019° true extended centerline and at the mathematically exact 3° path altitude, approaching over the sea toward the 1,628 m strip. Nice VMC with a steady 20 kt wind from the right of the aircraft (~109° true — pure right cross). Short length and upslope demand a precise, low, firm touchdown. Start/Restart leaves the sim paused after settle — unpause when ready.
hudTips: Start free flight in A330-200 (RR) first — Challenge Lab will not hot-swap aircraft.
After Start/Restart you stay PAUSED at spawn — press GO on the HUD when ready to fly.
Start config: gear up, flaps 0, spoilers in, parking brake off. Set landing flaps on approach.
LGSK 01 is only 1,628 m with an upslope — plan a firm touchdown early and manage energy.
Wind 110/20: pure right cross from ~109° true. Crab on final; kick straight before touchdown.
Edit spawn / timeOfDay / weather in this JSON, then restart the challenge.
